posts.content:
GPT-5.5 in Codex made a surprisingly solid table top RPG game masters guide & player guide, which it "playtested." It leans into the storytelling aspect & still has some very LLM-y elements, but it is a novel setting

PDF: drive.google.com/file/d/10QKn...
More: www.oneusefulthing.org/p/sign-of-th...
